title: SEO/AEO on-page hardening: credibility bugs, demo-content exclusion, rendering strategy, CWV & content i18n

tasks.title: Audit client:* islands for SSR↔hydration critical-content mismatch
tasks.description: Enumerate every client:* React island in apps/web that displays critical content (prices, availability, badges, counts, ratings). Produce a compliance checklist marking each as compliant or offending, with file+line. Confirm AnimatedCounter.client.tsx is the primary offender (useState(0) revealed only on hydration). Ref US-2. Tests: none (audit artifact); output feeds T-004/T-005.

subtasks.title: For each, compare SSR-rendered output vs hydrated state

tasks.title: Confirm thin-content predicate and available count fields for destinations
tasks.description: Verify the exact emptiness predicate (accCount===0 && eventsCount===0 && attractions.length===0) and that these count fields are available in both destinos/[...path].astro (~L424) and sitemap-dynamic.xml.ts (L303-306). Decide where to extract the shared predicate helper. Ref US-3. Tests: none (analysis); output feeds T-006.

tasks.title: Capture baseline CWV measurement and page inventory
tasks.description: Record a baseline LCP/CLS/INP measurement (PostHog web-vitals or Lighthouse) for key page types and build a page inventory for Wave 4 classification. Informs OQ-3 (perf work is measurement-gated). Ref US-10. Tests: none (measurement artifact attached to Linear issue); output feeds T-015/T-017.

subtasks.title: Measure LCP/CLS/INP on home, listing, detail
Attach numbers to HOS-117 Linear issue

tasks.title: Fix homepage stat counters to SSR the final value (progressive enhancement)
tasks.description: Make AnimatedCounter.client.tsx / StatsSection.astro emit the real final value as static text in SSR HTML; animate only visually after hydration (from a start value up to the value already in the DOM). Reuse the home-guards.ts:41-50 pattern for the failure/zero case so a legit-0 or API failure hides the counter instead of showing 0+. Preserve prefers-reduced-motion. Ref US-1. Tests: integration test asserting raw SSR HTML of the 5 counters contains real values, never 0+ (T-018 covers full suite).

subtasks.title: Pass final value to island as SSR text
Animate from start→final on hydrate (visual only)

tasks.title: Fix flagged islands and document the SSR-emits-final-datum principle
tasks.description: Fix any island flagged offending by the T-001 audit so its raw SSR HTML carries the final value (regression test per island). Document the principle in apps/web/CLAUDE.md SEO/animations section: an island's SSR output emits the final datum; hydration only animates/interacts, never reveals a value. If audit finds only the counter, still document the rule. Ref US-2. Tests: regression test per fixed island asserting value present in SSR string.

subtasks.title: Fix each offending island's SSR output

tasks.title: noindex empty destinations and exclude them from the sitemap
tasks.description: Using the single shared predicate from T-002, pass noindex={true} from destinos/[...path].astro to DetailLayout for empty destinations (emits <meta name=robots content=noindex,follow>), and exclude the same destinations (all 3 locales) from sitemap-dynamic.xml.ts. Both call sites MUST use the identical predicate (no divergence). Non-empty destinations stay indexable. Ref US-3. Tests: assert noindex meta on empty dest + absence from sitemap; assert non-empty stays indexed (T-018).

subtasks.title: Exclude empty destinations from sitemap builder

tasks.title: Add BreadcrumbJsonLd to gastronomy/experiences and extend CI guard to 6 entities
tasks.description: Add BreadcrumbJsonLd to gastronomia/[slug].astro and experiencias/[slug].astro following the pattern at alojamientos/[slug].astro:497. Extend json-ld-coverage.test.ts DETAIL_PAGES (currently 4) to cover all 6 detail entities so the gap cannot silently regrow (root-cause fix). Ref US-4. Tests: json-ld-coverage.test.ts green with 6 entities, failing if any drops Breadcrumb or primary JSON-LD.

subtasks.title: Extend DETAIL_PAGES to 6 entities in the guard test

tasks.title: Decide demo-content exclusion mechanism (OQ-1/OQ-4) with tradeoffs
tasks.description: Present coarse (env/host gate, all-or-nothing) vs granular (per-entity isSeed/noIndex flag) exclusion, and full-site vs selective noindex (OQ-4), with tradeoffs, for owner decision. Recommendation: coarse now (prod is 100% demo) with a documented low-effort path to degrade to granular. Ref US-5. Tests: none (decision); output shapes T-009/T-010.

subtasks.title: Get owner decision, record on Linear issue

tasks.title: Implement chosen demo-content exclusion mechanism
tasks.description: Implement the mechanism decided in T-008 so all demo/seed public content is out of the index in production, with a documented path to degrade coarse→granular when real content mixes in. Real content must become indexable by flipping a flag/env, not editing logic. Ref US-5. Tests: toggle test — real content indexable, demo not (T-019).

subtasks.title: Implement gate/flag driving noindex + sitemap exclusion

tasks.title: Add granular isSeed/noIndex flag if OQ-1 chose granular (schema + seed dual-write)
tasks.description: Only if T-008 chose granular: add isSeed/noIndex flag to accommodations + accommodation.schema.json (structural migration via db:generate+db:migrate) and set it in seed data via the MANDATORY seed dual-write (baseline JSON + numbered data-migration via db:seed:make). Drives noindex meta + sitemap exclusion. Skip entirely if coarse. Ref US-5. Tests: flag-driven exclusion asserted (T-019).

tasks.title: Raise FAQ coverage of published accommodations to the OQ target
tasks.description: Raise the share of published accommodations with ≥1 real FAQ from 52% (avg 1.19) to the OQ-6 target (owner input). Add real FAQ content (no lorem) via seed DATA using the MANDATORY dual-write (baseline + numbered data-migration). FAQPageJsonLd already renders them. Ref US-6. Tests: seed-data count assertion meets target (T-020).

subtasks.title: Author real FAQ content in baseline fixtures

tasks.title: Review programmatic landings for unique prose; decide geo×type dimension
tasks.description: Review existing landings (tipo/[type], comodidades/[slug], caracteristicas/[slug]) so each has (or gets a documented plan for) unique intro prose, not just a filtered list. Evaluate adding a geo×type landing dimension (e.g. /destino/cabañas/) and record go/no-go with duplicate-content risk + unique-prose requirement per landing. Ref US-7. Tests: none (content/decision); prose additions covered by existing render tests.

subtasks.title: Audit current landings for unique prose
Add/plan unique intro prose per landing

tasks.title: Update json-ld-audit.md to typed-component reality
tasks.description: Rewrite apps/web/docs/seo/json-ld-audit.md to describe the current typed JSON-LD components (not the obsolete pre-SPEC-157 inline-object pattern), list all 6 entities + their components, and point at json-ld-coverage.test.ts as the enforced contract. Ref US-8. Tests: none (docs).

subtasks.title: Point to the CI guard test as the contract

tasks.title: Wave 3 content i18n — macro task (decide OQ-2 split first)
tasks.description: MACRO task, kept unsplit because OQ-2 may move it to its own sub-spec. Decide OQ-2 (split vs keep). If kept: migrate accommodation/destination text fields (name/description/faqs) from plain text to {es,en,pt} shape (structural migration + seed dual-write), wire resolveI18nText into consumers, and close the seo.ts per-locale gap so SEOHead + JSON-LD use the locale value. LARGE — atomize into ~4-6 sub-tasks via /replan if kept here. Ref US-9. Tests: resolveI18nText fallback + localized SEO/JSON-LD (T-020).

subtasks.title: Decide OQ-2 (split to sub-spec or keep)
If kept: seed dual-write + wire resolveI18nText

tasks.title: Classify each public page: prerender / SSR+edge-cache / pure-SSR
tasks.description: Using the T-003 page inventory, classify every public page as prerender-candidate, SSR+edge-cache, or pure-SSR, each with a reason. Document the anti-myth in the spec/docs: SSR vs prerender does NOT change indexability; prerender only helps CWV via TTFB/CDN. Ref US-10. Tests: none (classification artifact).

tasks.title: Verify Cloudflare edge caching of catalog SSR; prerender truly-static pages
tasks.description: Verify whether Cloudflare actually caches catalog SSR responses (cache headers / hit-ratio evidence; scheduleRevalidationBatch revalidation already exists). Prerender the pages classified truly-static (legal/marketing) in T-015 if warranted. Any header change is infra/config recorded on the Linear issue, not a new route. Ref US-10. Tests: none code; evidence attached to issue.

subtasks.title: Check CF cache headers / hit ratio on catalog SSR

tasks.title: Measurement-gated CWV fixes (before/after LCP/CLS/INP)
tasks.description: For any perf fix, measure CWV before (baseline from T-003), apply, re-measure after; commit only with numbers on the Linear issue (OQ-3 process gate). No perf fix without measurement. Ref US-10. Tests: none automated; measurement recorded on issue.

subtasks.title: Measure before, apply fix, measure after
Attach before/after numbers to Linear issue

tasks.title: Wave 0 raw-SSR-HTML tests
tasks.description: Assert on rendered HTML string (no hydration): the 5 counters carry real final values (never 0+); empty destinations emit noindex,follow and are absent from the sitemap while non-empty stay indexed; 6/6 detail entities emit BreadcrumbJsonLd. Extends/complements json-ld-coverage.test.ts. Ref US-1/US-2/US-3/US-4. Tests: integration suite on SSR output.

tasks.title: Wave 1 demo-exclusion toggle test
tasks.description: Assert the exclusion mechanism: toggling the flag/env makes real content indexable and demo content noindex/absent from sitemap, without a logic change. Ref US-5. Tests: integration toggling gate/flag.

subtasks.title: Test demo excluded under production gate
Test real content indexable when flag flipped

tasks.title: Wave 2/3 seed-coverage and i18n fallback tests
tasks.description: Wave 2: seed-data assertion that FAQ coverage meets the OQ-6 target. Wave 3 (if in scope): resolveI18nText fallback (en/pt → es when translation absent) + localized SEO/JSON-LD name/description tests. Ref US-6/US-9. Tests: seed-count + i18n resolver.

subtasks.title: resolveI18nText fallback test (if Wave 3 in scope)

tasks.title: Docs, closeout, and off-page follow-up
tasks.description: Finalize apps/web/docs/seo/json-ld-audit.md; document the off-page authority gap (GSC, backlinks, domain age, editorial long-tail) as an Out-of-Scope follow-up (marketing/content-ops, not code); write closeout.md; record env vars/migrations/decisions on the HOS-117 Linear issue; apply status-needs-smoke-* labels if Wave 1/4 need live verification. Ref US-8. Tests: none (docs/cleanup).

subtasks.title: Record decisions/migrations on Linear issue + smoke labels
